title: Crossy Road Remake
expandedDescription: Crossy Road Remake is a small game project focused on graphics programming techniques.

The project was built in a basic engine with DirectX, PhysX, and a game loop already set up. I implemented systems including shadow mapping, skinned animations, sprite rendering, text rendering, a particle system, and post-processing.
The remake contains four terrain types: grass, water, road, and railway. These terrain layers are generated as the player moves forward.
I used a world grid to detect trees and rivers, and collider checks to detect cars and trains.
I wrote custom HLSL shaders, including geometry shaders for grass blades and road markings, plus a shader for customizing passing car colors.

projectInfo.label: Topics
projectInfo.value: Rendering systems, shaders, and engine programming
